meta.title: The Buddha on Intoxicants
meta.subtitle: An effect-based category, an instrumental precept, and the question of psychedelics.
meta.study_type: gated, interpretive (descriptive corpus + adversarially-verified science + flagged interpretation)
meta.prereg: research/intoxicants/PREREG-instrumental.md (frozen before §2a enumeration; all five predictions PASS)
meta.scope_note: Descriptive corpus claims are verified verbatim; the application of the effect-test to specific substances is interpretive, weighed against the science, and is not a normative ruling.

register_split.note: the other four precepts' content is in the dasakammapatha purity scheme; drink is not. drink = apāyamukha/pamādaṭṭhāna (dn31), the others = kammakilesā.

pamadatthana.note: a productive idiom (gambling, lodging, kingship), not a drink-word; commentary: 'pamādo ettha tiṭṭhatīti pamādaṭṭhānaṃ'.

capstone.gloss: majjapānameva saṃkilesakarañca bhedakarañca … pāṇātipātādīni sabbākusalāni karonti

gift.frame: mahādāna: abhayaṁ deti, averaṁ deti, abyābajjhaṁ deti

predictions.claim: instrumental mechanism exists; explicit 'guards the four' is commentarial

effect_test.majje_permutation: offence on majje regardless of perception; no offence for amajja with majja-vaṇṇa/gandha/rasa

verdicts.claim: Ego-dissolution is a constructed/reversible self-model alteration that can yield genuine not-self-congruent insight (Letheby), not direct perception of a mind-independent truth.
verdicts.note: Conjuncts (a) reversible self-model alteration and (c) can-yield-insight hold; (b) 'not veridical' is a contested metaphysical thesis, not an empirical finding.

verdicts.claim: Psychedelics sharpen rather than cloud the faculty, so the alcohol/majja faculty-degradation analogy fails.
verdicts.note: No global clouding at low dose (alcohol analogy fails there); but the robust blinded effect is reduced cognitive control (Pinhas 2026, N=1614), and high dose impairs processing speed (g≈1.13). 'Sharpening' does not survive blinding.

verdicts.claim: Psychedelics produce durable trait-level change (raised openness), challenging the reversible-state model.
verdicts.note: The trait-openness claim fails controlled designs (escitalopram comparator). Neuroplastic (~weeks) and clinical (~months) durability survive, but neither is samuccheda fetter-cutting; the acute intoxication reverses within hours.

verdicts.claim: Classic psychedelics are radically less harmful than alcohol on dependence, violence, and the precept's consequential harms.
verdicts.note: ACCEPT for dependence + disinhibition-violence (no withdrawal, no compulsion, no causal aggression; Nutt 2010): the cascade behind 'breaks the other precepts' does not transfer. TRIM 'harmless': COMPASS suicidality SAEs (dose-graded), acute panic, HPPD. 'Less harmful', not 'safe'.

science.anthropology: Ritual entheogen use across five continents is structured against heedlessness, the opposite of pamāda.
science.stoned_ape: Unsupported; treated as pseudoscience. Included only as the fringe line.

loci.title: Siṅgālasutta
loci.role: the six ādīnava + drink first among the apāyamukha

loci.title: Dhammikasutta
loci.role: ummādana; apuññāyatana; the seed 'madā hi pāpāni karonti'

loci.title: Rajanīyasutta
loci.role: madanīye majjati, object = the five kāma

loci.title: 51. Surāpānasikkhāpada
loci.role: the rule: Sāgata nidāna; the majje permutations

loci.title: 1. Surāpānasikkhāpadavaṇṇanā
loci.role: Sp on Pc 51: unsuitable for one of the five higher knowledges

loci.title: Āmagandhasutta
loci.role: Āmagandhasutta: taint is conduct, not substance

loci.title: Cundasutta
loci.role: the soceyya purity scheme (drink absent; the other four present)
